exact_blockers: not integrated into the STWM teacher-cache pipeline yet
needs an adapter from trajectory-field outputs to persistent per-object sampled tracks
requires a fresh audit of query strategy, object binding, and storage format
no PointOdyssey dataset directory was found under /raid/chen034/workspace/stwm/data
only old training outputs and dataset wrapper code are present locally
no local TAPIR official repo/weights were found

h32_h64_feasibility.current_h16_status: works_but_already_shows_contiguous-frame eligibility loss on many clips
h32_h64_feasibility.reason: V16 H16 logs already show many failures from insufficient contiguous frames; H32/H64 would require re-windowing from longer source clips and likely a new eligibility policy

storage_estimate_sampled_cache_only.note: rough linear estimate from live M128/M512 H8/H16 sampled-point caches; actual coverage would likely drop before storage becomes the main blocker

current_cotracker_reference_cost.live_reference_scope: 2132 clips across M128/M512 and H8/H16 sampled-point caches
current_cotracker_reference_cost.note: current live repo gives a concrete storage anchor for sampled-point caches, but not a trustworthy end-to-end B200 runtime benchmark

traceanything_pilot_500_clips.gpu: 1x B200 should satisfy the official >=48GB VRAM requirement
traceanything_pilot_500_clips.time_estimate: approximately 0.5-2 B200-days depending on batching, resolution, and whether dense intermediate fields are retained
traceanything_pilot_500_clips.sampled_cache_storage_estimate: approximately 1-3 GB if only sampled object-point tracks are kept
traceanything_pilot_500_clips.raw_dense_intermediate_storage_estimate: tens to low hundreds of GB if raw trajectory-field intermediates are retained

traceanything_full_2kplus_clips.time_estimate: approximately 2-7 B200-days depending on resolution, cache format, and whether H32/H64 is attempted
traceanything_full_2kplus_clips.sampled_cache_storage_estimate: approximately 3-10 GB if sampled caches only
traceanything_full_2kplus_clips.raw_dense_intermediate_storage_estimate: likely the dominant storage cost and may exceed 100 GB

why_new_benchmark_or_teacher_is_needed: The current CoTracker-teacher H8/H16 setup is CV-saturated at deployable top-1 mode selection.
V21 oracle gains do not transfer into a claimable top-1 world-model result.
A stronger trajectory-field teacher or GT point-trajectory benchmark is needed to test true object-dense forecasting value.
recommended_ostf_v2_roadmap: Pilot TraceAnything as a denser trajectory-field teacher with object-mask-conditioned point extraction and persistent identity auditing.
If PointOdyssey GT can be materialized locally, add it as a non-pseudo-target benchmark for dense-point forecasting.
Use TAP-style point-trajectory benchmarks for harder nonlinear/occlusion-heavy evaluation when the benchmark payload is fully local and reproducible.
Redesign clip windowing before attempting H32/H64; current H16 logs already reveal eligibility loss from insufficient contiguous frames.
Only revisit main-paper OSTF claims after a redesigned teacher/benchmark stack produces non-CV top-1 gains.
